purpose: Normal positive corrosion rate and remaining life.
Current thickness below minimum must block final-use status.
Zero corrosion rate must avoid divide-by-zero and require review.
Current thickness greater than previous thickness indicates data/evidence/unit/timing issue.
Missing previous thickness prevents corrosion-rate calculation.
Numeric calculation may be possible, but promotion/final use must be blocked without evidence.
Remaining life below threshold must trigger action-required status.
Unit mismatch must block final use until engineer confirms conversion basis.
